mnemonics: Mother In Laws Always Need Help
keyPoints: Multiple Threads can improve the performance of an application by utilizing the CPU's resources efficiently
isAlive() method checks if a thread is alive or not. A thread is considered alive if it has not been terminated.
join() method is used to wait until a thread terminates before proceeding with the main thread.
Thread Priorities can be set using the setPriority() method which determines how often a thread will be preempted by other threads.
Synchronization is achieved using locks, semaphores, and monitors. They help to protect shared resources from concurrent access.
Interthread Communication can be achieved using threads, semaphores, monitors, and queues. These help to enable threads to share data.
